title: Keeps logging me out
text: Every time I open the app I have to log back in. Very annoying.

title: Can't login at all

text: After many follow-ups support finally resolved my transfer problem. But it took too long.

title: Hidden fees on currency conversion
text: I was charged a 1.5% currency conversion fee that was never disclosed during the transaction.

text: The RRSP interest rate is below market rate and I wasn't informed when it dropped.

text: The T5 slips were available much later than other platforms. Made filing my taxes stressful.

title: Great experience overall
text: I love the simple interface and the cashback features. Best finance app I've used.

title: Very user friendly
text: Simple clean design and easy to navigate. I recommend to all my friends.

title: Excellent customer service
text: Support team was very helpful and resolved my problem within hours.

title: Very detailed feedback on app performance
text: This is an extremely detailed review about the performance issues I have been experiencing with the Wealthsimple application over the past several months. The application has been crashing repeatedly on my iPhone 15 Pro running iOS 17.4.1. I have tried reinstalling the app multiple times, clearing the cache, restarting my phone, and even doing a factory reset but nothing seems to fix the persistent crashing issue. The crashes happen most frequently when I am trying to view my portfolio or when I attempt to execute a trade. I have lost money because of these crashes since my orders were not completed even though the app showed them as processing. Furthermore the loading times have become increasingly slow over the past few weeks and the app sometimes takes more than two minutes to display my portfolio balance. The portfolio charts also fail to load properly and show outdated information. I have contacted customer support about these issues but received only generic responses that did not address my specific problem. I am very disappointed with the quality of this application given that it handles my financial assets. I would strongly recommend that the development team prioritize stability improvements before adding new features. The constant crashes and slow performance make this app unreliable for active investors who need real-time information and quick trade execution. Please fix these critical issues as soon as possible.

title: Problèmes de déclaration fiscale
text: Les documents fiscaux pour l'année précédente ne sont toujours pas disponibles dans l'application bien que nous soyons en avril. J'ai besoin de mes relevés T5 et T4 pour compléter ma déclaration de revenus avant la date limite. Le service client n'a pas été en mesure de me dire quand ces documents seront disponibles.
